product: Configure PrivateLink connections from serverless compute to S3 Storage…
tagline: You can now enable AWS PrivateLink to your S3 storage buckets from serverless compute.
what_it_does: You can now enable AWS PrivateLink to your S3 storage buckets from serverless compute. Preview This feature is in Public Preview. To join this preview, contact your Databricks account team.
why_it_matters: note Databricks charges for networking costs when serverless workloads connect to customer resources, and when performance intensive services egress data cross region back to clients.
key_takeaway: You can now enable AWS PrivateLink to your S3 storage buckets from serverless compute.
